title: Grammar Level 4: Present Continuous
description: Learn to describe actions happening right now using the continuous markers रहा है (masculine) and रही है (feminine).
keyPoints: Example: 'जा रहा है' means 'He is going'.

title: Forming Continuous Actions
explanation: Take the verb root (e.g. जा from जाना - to go), add 'रहा' for masculine subject or 'रही' for feminine subject, then add the appropriate present tense auxiliary.

englishSentence: I am eating (Masculine) / Tôi đang ăn
She is going / Cô ấy đang đi

title: Continuous Mastery
takeaways: Learned to form the present continuous tense.
